ksa_text: Skill in translating business questions and customer requirements into structured analytical approaches, including defining data requirements, scoping analysis, and selecting appropriate methodology.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data visualization tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-007 (Core Abilities/Skill) scores 0.460 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.460) and is edge_case for the Data Engineer role. The KSA is an edge case for Core Abilities but contains 0 DE pattern signals sufficient to warrant inclusion for a senior IC data engineer. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, NIST AI RMF signal (0.460), and Core Abilities handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support this Core Ability as a distinct Data Engineer competency at IC/senior IC level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: General abilities appear implicitly in DE postings but rarely as discrete competencies. When explicit, they appear in context of pipeline design, data modeling, or quality enforcement (DE signals here: 0, composite: 0.460).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. General ability without sufficient DE-specific context is not a distinct market requirement. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. General ability without sufficient DE-specific context is not a distinct market requirement. Final decision: exclude.
